text: I find myself in a space dedicated to curiosity and innovation, surrounded by the promise of ideas taking shape. The bright, clean lines and bold colors suggest an optimism about the future, yet the environment feels sterile and slightly aloof. I am both intrigued by the pursuit of knowledge and aware of a lingering sense of separation between the work on display and the reality it might one day shape. Here, possibility and uncertainty mingle—a museum of minds reaching forward.
